summary: Completed frontend testing of Cooe Gaming platform iteration 2. Successfully tested new LiveBetsPanel component on all 5 game pages, split layout implementation, and enhanced Admin Dashboard. All major features working correctly with excellent UI/UX.
passed_tests: LiveBetsPanel: Successfully implemented on Aviator page with simulated players, avatars, masked names, bet amounts
LiveBetsPanel: Working on WinGo page with split layout (bets left, game right)
LiveBetsPanel: Present and functional on AB Fun, Lucky Hit, and Soccer Go pages
Split Layout: Correct implementation on Aviator and WinGo (LiveBetsPanel on left, game on right)
Simulated Players: Avatars from dicebear API, masked names (Raj***S format), realistic bet amounts
Admin Dashboard: 4 stats cards (Total Users: 5, Revenue: 150, Total Bets: 11, Pending Withdrawals: 3)
Admin Dashboard: 3 tabs (Users, Transactions, Game Stats) all functional
Admin Dashboard: Users table with search functionality
Admin Dashboard: User management (balance adjustment $ button, ban/unban button for each user)
Admin Dashboard: Shows 5 users with proper data (names, emails, balances, status, actions)
Theme Toggle: Dark/Light mode switch working correctly (tested dark to light transition)
Game Functionality: Aviator game showing live multiplier (39.34x), crash history strip
Game Functionality: WinGo game with timer, color betting (Red/Green/Violet), number betting (0-9)
Authentication: Admin login working with admin@example.com/admin123
Navigation: Smooth navigation between all game pages and admin dashboard
